question: How can you set float valve for a multi-use pressure cooker and air fryer?
content:
To install the float valve, drop the narrow end into the float-valve hole on top of the pressure-cooking lid. Turn the lid over, then firmly attach the silicone cap to the bottom of the float valve; the cap is shown being pressed onto the valve underside.<PIC>
Do not operate the pressure cooker unless the float valve and silicone cap are properly installed.
ret: "To install the float valve, drop the narrow end into the float-valve hole on top of the pressure-cooking lid. Turn the lid over, then firmly attach the silicone cap to the bottom of the float valve; the cap is shown being pressed onto the valve underside.<PIC>\nDo not operate the pressure cooker unless the float valve and silicone cap are properly installed.",["Manual30_37"]
notes: Question answered from the Instant Pot Duo Crisp + Air Fryer float valve and silicone cap maintenance section. One installation image is used because it directly shows attaching the silicone cap to the bottom of the float valve.
